Teddi+ Immunity Gummies (Strawberry)

RM80.00Price

The Immune Support gummy is formulated to strengthen the body’s natural defense system. Enriched with Vitamin C and Zinc, it helps support immune function and protect against common illnesses. Its strawberry flavor makes it enjoyable for daily consumption, especially for individuals with busy lifestyles or frequent fatigue.
